original: a copy of a white suit made for Liriel Armstrong

original: The Premium Armstrong Suit is a white outfit made of fabric that is latex-tight, yet silky smooth against the skin. The suit itself leaves little to the imagination, with holes designed to leave your ass, chest and groin free for easy access. Regardless, you probably shouldn’t wear this anywhere you can’t walk around naked. As an added bonus, special microbots within the fabric help to enhance your shields.
